chunks.text: Order Sheet IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH BENCH AT SUKKUR Cr. Bail Appln. No. S – 40 of 2023 Date of hearing Order with signature of Judge Fresh case 1. For orders on MA No.346/2023 (Ex./A) 2. For hearing of bail application 20.01.2023 Mr. Muhammad Ibrahim Z. Ghambir, Advocate along with applicant/accused. <><><><>..<><><><> 1. Exemption is granted subject to all just legal exceptions. 2. Through instant bail application, applicant/accused, namely, Abdul Ghafoor son of Rahim Bux by caste Bhangar, seeks protective bail in Crime No.03 of 2020 registered at Police Station Pir Jo Goth for offence under Sections 460, 459, 337F(v),147, 148 & 149 PPC. Learned Counsel for the applicant/accused contends that earlier the applicant was granted pre-arrest bail by leaned Additional Sessions Judge-II, Khairpur in the instant case vide order dated 15.04.2020 and thereafter he was attending the trial Court regularly. However, another case being Crime No.41 of 2021 under Sections 324, 114, 504, 34 PPC, was registered at P.S, F.M.Narejo against the applicant, wherein he obtained pre-arrest bail vide order dated 14.01.2023, but as the applicant could not attend the trial Court, it has issued NBWS against the applicant in the instant FIR. Learned counsel also submits that the applicant is ready to surrender before the Court concerned, but apprehends his immediate arrest; hence, he seeks protection of law. Without touching the merits and de-merits of the case, protective bail for a period of seven days w.e.f. 20.01.2023 to 26.01.2023 (both days are inclusive) is granted to the applicant/accused subject to his furnishing solvent surety in the sum of Rs.25,000/- (Twenty Five Thousand) and P.R. bond in the like amount to the satisfaction of the Additional Registrar of this Court.

Learned counsel also submits that the applicant is ready to surrender before the Court concerned, but apprehends his immediate arrest; hence, he seeks protection of law. Without touching the merits and de-merits of the case, protective bail for a period of seven days w.e.f. 20.01.2023 to 26.01.2023 (both days are inclusive) is granted to the applicant/accused subject to his furnishing solvent surety in the sum of Rs.25,000/- (Twenty Five Thousand) and P.R. bond in the like amount to the satisfaction of the Additional Registrar of this Court. Applicant/accused is directed to surrender before the Court concerned in the aforesaid period. This order shall cease to have its effect after expiry of seven days or whenever the applicant/accused surrender before the Court concerned, which one occurs earlier. Criminal Bail application stands disposed of in the above terms. JUDGE Ahmad
